title: Smoke Hot Slovakian Meat Skewers
description: A roasted Slovakian dish featuring green chilli, perfect for a date night, kosher friendly and smoke hot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Add the diced green chilli to the bowl and mix until everything is well combined.
Cut the smoke flavored pork sausage into 1 inch pieces and add to the bowl.
Mix everything together until the sausage is well coated with the spice mixture.
Thread the sausage mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the sausage is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional diced green chilli if desired.
